questionHtml:
What is a benefit of having xylem vessels close to phloem sieve tubes in plants?

A.  Sugars can flow in both xylem vessels and phloem.

B.  Water can be supplied more easily to the phloem.

C.  A high concentration of solutes can be established at the source.

D.  Hydrostatic pressure can be established to move sugars to the source.
